<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Logging\TeamCity\Subscriber; use PHPUnit\Event\Test\Finished; use PHPUnit\Event\Test\FinishedSubscriber; /** * @internal */ final class TestFinishedSubscriber extends Subscriber implements FinishedSubscriber { public function notify(Finished $event): void { $this->logger()->testFinished($event); } }
